description: npm package publish: Already shipped before COMP-UPDATE was filed. `package.json` has `bin`, `files`, `publishConfig: public`, `prepublishOnly`. `.github/workflows/publish.yml` publishes on `v*` tags with provenance; `beta.yml` publishes betas; `publish-compose-mcp.yml` ships the MCP server. `npm view @smartmemory/compose dist-tags`: `latest: 0.1.0`, `beta: 0.1.7-beta`.
